response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and demonstrates deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest equivalents), and architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and process advocacy. His resume exceeds the 6-year requirement and shows exceptional breadth across languages and domains.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker across multiple enterprises
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling development, including MCP code generators
Strong advocacy for testing, CI/CD, and engineering best practices with open-source contributions
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent tools (Jest, GraphQL) are used
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Some roles (e.g., DLang, embedded) are niche and may indicate fragmented focus, though not a red flag
